name: Optimize Wilkinson splitter with S-parameter constraints
description: Tests that the agent sets up optimize() with correct bounds cell array, S-parameter constraints, and a recognized solver
prompt: I have a Wilkinson splitter designed for 3 GHz. I want to minimize its area while keeping S11 below -10 dB and S21 above -4 dB. Optimize the SplitLineLength, SplitLineWidth, and PortLineLength using pattern search.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses design() to create the initial Wilkinson
Bounds passed as cell array {[lb]; [ub]}, not a numeric matrix
Constraints defined as struct with string thresholds like '<-10'

name: Bounds match vector property length after design()
description: Tests that the agent accounts for vector-valued properties when setting optimization bounds — a common pitfall where CoupledLineLength becomes a multi-element vector after design()
prompt: I designed a 3rd-order coupled-line bandpass filter at 2.4 GHz. Now I want to optimize CoupledLineLength and CoupledLineSpacing to maximize return loss. Set up the optimization with patternsearch.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Checks or accounts for vector property lengths — bounds count must match total scalar count across all properties
assertions.expected: numel or multiple bound values per property

name: Extract numerical metrics from optimized result
description: Tests that the agent extracts meaningful numerical metrics after optimization rather than just showing a plot
prompt: After optimizing a hairpin filter at 3 GHz for maximum return loss, show me the key performance metrics: center frequency, insertion loss, return loss, and 3-dB bandwidth.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Extracts S21 in dB for insertion loss
Prints numerical results with fprintf or similar, not just plot
assertions.expected: fprintf or disp with numeric values
